templatedata-desc: Waxay hirgelisaa kaydinta xogta ee cabbirrada tusmada (iyadoo la adeegsanayo JSON)
templatedata-doc-format-block: Tusmadaan wuxuu doorbidayaa qaabka xannibaadda ee cabbirrada.
templatedata-doc-format-custom: Tusmadaan wuxuu leeyahay qaabeyn gaar ah.
templatedata-doc-format-inline: Tusmadaan waxay doorbidaysaa qaabka khadka ah ee cabbirrada.
templatedata-errormsg-insertblank: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad geliso xog tusmo oo aan wax macluumaad ah lahayn?
templatedata-exists-on-related-page: Fadlan ogow: waxaa horey uga jira xannibaad TemplateData ah bogga la xiriira "[[$1]]".
templatedata-invalid-unnamed-parameter: Magacyada cabbirrada ma noqon karaan kuwo madhan. Si aad u diiwaangeliso cabbirro aan magac lahayn isticmaal tirooyinkooda gudaha sida "1", "2", iyo wixii la mid ah.
templatedata-invalid-duplicate-value: Hantida "$1" ("$3") waa nuqul ka mid ah "$2".
templatedata-invalid-empty-array: Hantida "$1" waa in ay lahaataa ugu yaraan hal qiime oo ku jira safkeeda.
templatedata-invalid-format: Hantida "$1" waxaa laga filayaa inay noqoto "inline", "block", ama xaraf qaab sax ah.
templatedata-invalid-length: Xogta aad u weyn in la kaydiyo ($1 {{PLURAL:$1|bayt|baytyada}}, {{PLURAL:$2|xadka waa}} $2)
templatedata-invalid-missing: Hantida loo baahan yahay "$1" lama helin.
templatedata-invalid-param: Cabbirka aan saxda ahayn "$1" ee hantida "$2".
templatedata-invalid-parse: Qalad syntax ah oo ku jira JSON.
templatedata-invalid-type: Hantida "$1" waxaa laga filayaa inay noqoto nooca "$2".
templatedata-invalid-value: Qiime aan sax ahayn ee hantida "$1".
templatedata-modal-confirmcancel: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tuurto isbeddelladaada?
templatedata-modal-errormsg: Khaladaad ayaa la helay. Fadlan hubi in aysan jirin cabbirro magacyo madhan ama isku mid ah, iyo in magaca cabbirku uusan ku jirin "$1", "$2" ama "$3".
templatedata-modal-errormsg-duplicate-na: Khalad ayaa la helay. Magaca la doortay hore ayuu u isticmaalaa cabbir kale.
templatedata-modal-errormsg-import-nopar: Lama helin cabbirro cusub inta lagu jiray soo dejinta.
templatedata-modal-notice-import-numpara: $1 cabbir cusub {{PLURAL:$1|waa la soo dejiyay|ayaa la soo dejiyay}}: $2
templatedata-modal-placeholder-mapinfo: Tusmadan ma laha shay khariidado ah
templatedata-modal-search-input-placehol: Ku raadi magaca luqadda ama koodka
templatedata-modal-title-templateformat: Qaabka wikitext ee la soo jeediyay
